chain.thought: Explanation: Among the listed stadiums, the most recent opening year is 2013 for the Allianz Riviera. Therefore, it was the last to be opened.

judge_thought: Explanation: The "opened" years show the most recent is 2013 for Allianz Riviera (Nice). All other stadiums have earlier years (e.g., 2012 for Grand Stade Lille Métropole and Grand Stade du Havre, 2011 for MMArena and Stade du Hainaut). Therefore, Allianz Riviera is the last to be opened.
